---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="position:relative; background-image: url('images/banner.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center 40%; padding: 54px 0 62px; border-bottom: 1px solid #d4c8b4;">
  <div style="position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; bottom:0; background: rgba(245,240,230,0.55);"></div>
  <div class="container" style="position:relative; z-index:1;">
    <div class="row align-items-left g-5">
      <div class="col-md-auto text-left">
        <img src="images/Headshot.png" class="profile-photo" alt="Dr. Andrew E. Anderson">
      </div>
      <div class="col">
        <h1 style="font-size:2.6rem; color:#2e2b25; font-weight:bold; line-height:1.15; margin-bottom:0.2rem; text-shadow: 1px 1px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.9);">
          Dr. Andrew E. Anderson
        </h1>
        <p style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif; font-size:1rem; color:#2e2b25; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:1.4rem; text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.9);">
          Assistant Professor &amp; Extension Specialist in Livestock Economics · Utah State University
        </p>
        <div class="mb-3">
          <span class="tag">Production Economics</span>
          <span class="tag">Agricultural Prices</span>
          <span class="tag">Rangeland Economics</span>
          <span class="tag">Livestock Risk Management</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:14px;">
          <a href="work.qmd" class="btn-sage">Research &amp; Extension</a>
          <a href="blog/index.qmd" class="btn-sage">Blog</a>
          <a href="cv.pdf" class="btn-outline">Download CV</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```


## About

I study the economics of livestock production and marketing, with a focus on the Intermountain West. My extension program delivers practical economic analysis to producers and industry stakeholders across the region.

I attended BYU-Idaho, Purdue, and completed my Ph.D. at Kansas State University. I was raised in rural Idaho, surrounded by agriculture, and that practical background continues to inform my work.


### Contact

**Email:** [a.anderson@usu.edu](mailto:a.anderson@usu.edu)
**Office:** AGRS 227

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=sE1rhdYAAAAJ&hl=en) · [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-9478-0703)
